description: **OK Café** in Sandy Springs is hiring Host Cashiers at an average hourly rate of $21–$23 an hour. This family-owned restaurant has been open 37 years and offers health, dental, vision, and 401k matching — plus no late nights and a family-oriented environment. If you want steady daytime hours at one of the busiest spots in the city, it's worth a look.

description: **Southeast Clips** (Great Clips' largest franchisee in the country) is hiring full and part-time hair stylists and barbers, with flexible hours and an established customer base already in place. They put a lot of emphasis on effective wage, which factors in base pay, productivity, product commissions, and tips. Last week their staff averaged $31.26/hr in effective wage, so the earning potential is real for someone who's fast and consistent.

The role focuses on cost estimating and bid preparation for commercial buildings and industrial facilities, working closely with project teams on budgets and material takeoffs. Good fit for someone with a background in commercial construction estimating.

description: **Carenest Health Services** has a 13-week contract opening for a Registered Nurse specializing in Wound Care, with a Monday through Friday, 8am–4:30pm schedule. The role requires at least two years of recent wound care experience and current AHA BLS and CWOCN certifications. Good option for an RN looking for a daytime contract position without weekend shifts.

**Bonus help (free):** WorkSource Cobb is a free career resource for Cobb County residents, offering job search support, resume help, and connections to local employers. Worth a visit if you're back in the job market or just exploring what's out there.
**Cobb County Sheriff's Office** is currently hiring. If you're interested in law enforcement or civilian support roles with the county, their careers page has current openings posted.
**Cobb County** has open positions across county departments, all listed through their governmentjobs.com portal. Worth checking if you're looking for stable local government work close to home.

**Cobb County School District** is hiring across a range of positions. If you're interested in working in education locally, whether in the classroom or in support roles, their employment opportunities page is the place to start.
